data.label: Free Lossless Audio Codec
data.description:
FLAC是一款开源软件，它能在不丢失任何信息的前提下，减少存储数字音频信号所需的存储空间。
该软件读取和生成的文件被称为FLAC文件。由于其他软件也能读写这些符合FLAC格式的文件，因此该软件通常被称为FLAC参考实现。

data.label: Free Lossless Audio Codec
data.description:
FLAC is open-source software that reduces the storage space required for digital audio signals without losing any information.
The files read and generated by this software are called FLAC files. Since other software can also read and write these files conforming to the FLAC format, this software is often referred to as the FLAC reference implementation.
